metadata.revision_note: Governance now includes qualified client-module bridge controls: allowlisted module ids, sidecar manifest verification, binary sha256 verification before dynamic load, and a startup-only prod posture with live reload and switch disabled, alongside prior IV&V waiver handling, Power of 10 repository-policy checks, strict include-guard-only header policy, analyzer coverage, security CI coverage, pinned multi-platform CI, and automated GPU runner readiness.
